# CPA Validated
> Free, CPA-validated tax tools, validators, and reference guides. Founded April 2026. Every position backed by a specific IRC section or Treasury regulation. A tk.cpa resource.

## About
CPA Validated is a free, perpetual public resource built and personally validated by Timur Knyazev, CPA. Founded after Tax Day 2026 as a pro bono contribution from a licensed practitioner to the public. Every tool, validator, and guide is free, unconditioned, and cites primary legal authority.

## Practitioner Credentials
- NY CPA License #109025 (licensed 2012, active)
- FL CPA License #AC58472 (licensed 2022, active)
- IRS Enrolled Agent #93250 (enrolled 2009, active 2026, PTIN P00646638)
- Master of Science in Taxation - Zicklin School of Business, Baruch College (CUNY), 2011
- Big Four: Ernst & Young (EY) and PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), ~10 years
- AICPA Member, CGMA, ACCA CertIFRS, TEI, CTP, IIA CFSA

## Tools & Validators

### Substantial Presence Test Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/spt-calculator.html
- Authority: IRC §7701(b)(3); Treas. Reg. 301.7701(b)-1; Form 1040-NR
- Purpose: Weighted 3-year day count, days to trigger SPT, maximum safe days remaining. Two input methods: manual entry or trip-by-trip date log.

### Closer Connection Exception Checker
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/closer-connection.html
- Authority: IRC §7701(b)(3)(B); Treas. Reg. 301.7701(b)-2; Form 8840
- Purpose: Tests Form 8840 eligibility. Evaluates all 11 IRS closer connection factors. Green Card disqualifier flagged automatically.

### FBAR and Form 8938 Threshold Checker
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/fbar-checker.html
- Authority: 31 USC 5314; 31 CFR 1010.350; IRC §6038D; FinCEN 114; Form 8938
- Purpose: Determines FinCEN 114 (FBAR) and Form 8938 (FATCA) filing requirements. All account types. All four Form 8938 thresholds.

### Safe Harbor Estimated Tax Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/safe-harbor.html
- Authority: IRC §6654; IRS Publication 505
- Purpose: Federal and all 50 states. 110% rule applied. Quarterly schedule with state-specific due dates.

### Form 5472 Filing Obligation Checker
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/form-5472.html
- Authority: IRC §6038A; IRC §6038C; TD 9796 (2016)
- Purpose: 25% foreign ownership threshold, foreign-owned DE rules, all 11 reportable transaction categories.

### Tax Estimator 2026 - Personal and Corporate
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/tax-estimator.html
- Authority: IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32; IRC §1; IRC §11; OBBBA (P.L. 119-21)
- Purpose: 2026 personal and corporate tax estimates. All filing statuses, all 50 states, bracket-by-bracket breakdown.

### Puerto Rico Act 60 Tax Benefit Estimator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/act60-estimator.html
- Authority: Act 60 (P.R. 2019); Act 38-2026; IRC §933; Treas. Reg. §1.937-1
- Purpose: PR Act 60 savings analysis. Eligibility checker. Dec 31, 2026 deadline for 0% rate.

### USVI EDC Tax Benefit Estimator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/usvi-edc-estimator.html
- Authority: IRC §934; IRC §937; VI Code §713; USVIEDA
- Purpose: USVI EDC 90% tax credit. ~2.1% effective corporate rate. EDC vs. RTPark and PR Act 60 vs. USVI comparison.

### US Federal Tax Calendar 2026
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/tax-calendar.html
- Authority: IRC §6072; IRC §6654; IRC §6655; IRS Pub. 509; IRC §7503
- Purpose: Month-by-month calendar. W-2/1099-NEC Feb 2 (Jan 31=Saturday), 1065/1120-S Mar 16 (Mar 15=Sunday). Corporate and individual estimated tax. Key state deadlines.

### Real Estate Depreciation Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/depreciation-calculator.html
- Authority: IRC §168; Rev. Proc. 87-57; OBBBA (P.L. 119-21)
- Purpose: MACRS for residential (27.5yr), commercial (39yr), foreign ADS (40yr), QIP (15yr). Mid-month convention. Bonus depreciation for QIP: 40% (2026).

### Business Vehicle Depreciation Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/vehicle-depreciation.html
- Authority: IRC §168(k); IRC §179; IRC §280F; Rev. Proc. 2025-24
- Purpose: Section 179, bonus depreciation (40% 2026), MACRS 5-year. §280F luxury auto caps. SUVs, heavy trucks. Business use percentage slider.

### CFC / Form 5471 Obligation Checker
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/form-5471-checker.html
- Authority: IRC §957; IRC §951(b); IRC §6038; IRC §318/§958(b); TCJA §14214
- Purpose: 7-question validator. CFC status, all filing categories 1a-5b. TCJA downward attribution. $10,000 penalty flagged. Statute of limitations warning.

### Streamlined Filing Eligibility Checker
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/streamlined-checker.html
- Authority: IRM 4.26.16.6 (SFOP); IRM 4.26.16.7 (SDOP); 31 USC §5321
- Purpose: SDOP vs. SFOP eligibility. Non-willfulness test, IRS contact check, residency test (330 days). 0% penalty (SFOP) vs. 5% of highest balance (SDOP).

## Reference Guides

### One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA, P.L. 119-21) - The Biggest Provisions
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/obbba-guide.html
- Authority: P.L. 119-21; IRC §§24, 168(k), 168(n), 174A, 199A, 250, 951A, 1202, 2010(c)(3); Rev. Proc. 2025-28; Notice 2025-72
- Purpose: 18 verified provisions across individuals (SALT cap to $40K, $15M estate exemption, tip / overtime / senior / auto loan deductions, Trump Accounts), business (Section 174A R&E expensing, 100% bonus depreciation permanent, Section 168(n) qualified production property, Section 163(j) EBITDA, Section 199A QBI permanent, Section 1202 QSBS tiered exclusion, Section 179 expansion), and international (NCTI replaces GILTI, FDDEI replaces FDII, BEAT 10.5%). Effective dates and authority citations throughout.

### States with No Personal Income Tax (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/no-income-tax-states.html
- Authority: Tax Foundation 2026; State Tax Statutes; IRC §933
- Purpose: Nine states with no broad personal income tax. Washington capital gains tax exception. Sales and property tax context.

### Countries with No Personal Income Tax (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/no-income-tax-countries.html
- Authority: IRC §61; IRC §911; IRC §877A; 31 USC §5314
- Purpose: 19+ jurisdictions. Critical note for US persons: worldwide taxation regardless of residency. FEIE $126,500 (2026). Oman changing 2028.

### FBAR Penalties Explained (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/fbar-penalties.html
- Authority: 31 USC §5321; IRM 4.26.16; Bittner v. US (2023)
- Purpose: Willful vs. non-willful penalties. Bittner (2023): non-willful per form not per account. Streamlined, SDOP, SFOP, VDP explained.

### Pre-Immigration Tax Planning Checklist
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/pre-immigration-planning.html
- Authority: IRC §7701(b); IRC §1291-1298; IRC §951; IRC §877A
- Purpose: 9-step checklist before green card. Capital gains basis step-up, PFIC restructuring, foreign entity planning, dual-status year.

### Foreign Pension Reporting for US Persons
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/foreign-pension-reporting.html
- Authority: 31 USC §5314; IRC §6038D; IRC §402(b); Rev. Proc. 2020-17
- Purpose: Governmental DB vs. savings component distinction. Canada RRSP, Israel, Germany, UK, Russia. US-Russia treaty suspended August 2023.

### NCTI Explained (Formerly GILTI)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/gilti-explained.html
- Authority: IRC §951A (NCTI, formerly GILTI); IRC §250; IRC §957; IRC §960(d); IRC §962; OBBBA P.L. 119-21
- Purpose: NCTI - Net CFC Tested Income - is the post-OBBBA renaming of GILTI. Calculation, 12.6% effective corporate rate (40% Section 250 deduction), 90% foreign tax credit, elimination of QBAI shield, inclusion shareholder rule (any-day-during-year), §962 election, high-tax exclusion. Effective for tax years beginning after 12/31/2025.

### S-Corp vs. LLC Tax Comparison (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/scorp-vs-llc.html
- Authority: IRC §1361; IRC §1401; IRC §199A; Watson v. US (8th Cir. 2012)
- Purpose: SE tax savings, reasonable compensation, QBI interaction. $200K example. Break-even analysis.

### Form 3520: Foreign Gifts, Inheritances and Trusts
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/form-3520-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §6039F; IRC §6048; IRC §6677; IRC §679
- Purpose: 2026 thresholds ($100K individuals, $19,570 corporations). Penalties up to 35%. Aggregation rules. Trust reporting.

### IRC §1031 Like-Kind Exchange Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/1031-exchange-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §1031; Treas. Reg. §1.1031(k)-1; Rev. Proc. 2000-37
- Purpose: 45-day identification, 180-day closing, boot, QI, reverse exchange. Real property only since TCJA 2018.

### Crypto & NFT Tax Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/crypto-tax-guide.html
- Authority: IRS Notice 2014-21; Rev. Rul. 2023-14; IRC §1221; Form 8949
- Purpose: All taxable events. Mining, staking (Rev. Rul. 2023-14), DeFi. Wash sale does not apply. Form 1099-DA 2026 broker reporting.

### IRC §199A QBI Deduction Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/qbi-deduction-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §199A; Treas. Reg. §1.199A-1; OBBBA (P.L. 119-21)
- Purpose: 20% deduction. OBBBA made permanent. W-2 wage limitation, SSTB phase-out, rental safe harbor, aggregation election.

### Net Investment Income Tax Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/niit-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §1411; Treas. Reg. §1.1411-1; Form 8960
- Purpose: 3.8% surcharge on investment income above $200K/$250K. Real estate professional exception. Material participation. Crypto NIIT.

### Bonus Depreciation Phase-Down Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/bonus-depreciation-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §168(k); IRC §179; OBBBA (P.L. 119-21)
- Purpose: 40% in 2026, 20% in 2027, 0% in 2028+. What qualifies. Section 179 comparison. Election-out mechanics.

### US Expat Tax Filing Guide (2026)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/us-expat-tax-guide.html
- Authority: IRC §911; IRC §901; IRC §6012; 31 USC §5314
- Purpose: Who must file from abroad. FEIE $126,500. FTC vs FEIE. FBAR deadlines. State tax obligations. SE tax for self-employed expats.

## Special Pages

### Vetted Resources
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/vetted-resources.html
- Purpose: CPA-curated external resource directory. PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries, OECD, EY, KPMG, official government tax authorities (IRS, HMRC, CRA, Israel ITA, German BZSt), Tax Foundation, Avalara, TaxJar. 18 resources across 4 categories.

### About CPA Validated
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/about.html
- Purpose: Mission statement. Five commitments: Always Free, Always Cited, Always Current, Always Honest, Always Accountable. Founded April 2026 after Tax Day as a pro bono public resource.


### IRS Penalty & Interest Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/penalty-calculator.html
- Authority: IRC §6651(a)(1) (FTF 5%/month); IRC §6651(a)(2) (FTP 0.5%/month); IRC §6601 (interest 8% Q2 2026); IRC §6662(a) (accuracy 20%)
- Purpose: Failure-to-file, failure-to-pay, accuracy-related penalty, underpayment interest. Concurrent FTF/FTP offset applied. Reasonable cause flag. Date-based calculation.

### Foreign Tax Credit Calculator
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/ftc-calculator.html
- Authority: IRC §901 (FTC); IRC §904 (limitation); IRC §911 (FEIE); Form 1116
- Purpose: FEIE vs. FTC comparison. IRC §904 per-basket limitation. Carryforward. Shows which strategy produces lower US tax by country type.

### W-4 Withholding Optimizer
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/w4-optimizer.html
- Authority: IRC §3402; IRC §6654; IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32; Form W-4 (2026)
- Purpose: Target refund or balance due. Multiple jobs, spouse income, other income, credits. Produces exact W-4 Step 1-4 entries with per-period withholding amount.

### Corporate Extension Reference (C-Corp)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/corporate-extension.html
- Authority: IRC §6081; Form 7004; Treas. Reg. §1.6081-3; 59 state and local jurisdictions
- Purpose: Searchable/sortable C-Corp extension rules. Automatic vs. accepts federal vs. separate form. Verified March 2026. Includes local jurisdictions (NYC, Detroit, Philadelphia, SF, LA, Portland, Ohio RITA).

### Individual Extension Reference (Form 1040)
- URL: https://cpavalidated.com/individual-extension.html
- Authority: IRC §6081(a); Form 4868; Treas. Reg. §1.6081-4; 59 jurisdictions
- Purpose: Form 1040 extension rules. Expat 2-month auto extension, Form 2350, FBAR auto-extension, military/combat zone. 9 no-PIT states identified.

## Contact and Consultations
Website: https://tk.cpa
Book a Consultation: https://tk.cpa/contacts
GitHub: https://github.com/tk-cpa/cpavalidated

## Disclaimer
All tools and guides are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal or tax advice. Tax determinations are fact-specific. Consult a qualified tax professional before making any filing or planning decisions.
